testimonials.title: For people going places
testimonials.subtitle: Real stories from real customers
testimonial.1.text: They make our life split between two continents possible. Transfers are simple and very, very fast.
testimonial.1.author: Li Wei
testimonial.2.text: Exchange rates are way better than banks, and fees are transparent. I've recommended it to many friends.
testimonial.2.author: Chen Ming
testimonial.3.text: Essential for studying abroad! My parents send money and I exchange it right on the platform. So convenient.
testimonial.3.author: Wang Fang
testimonial.4.text: ExchangeHub makes cross-border life simple. Instant transfers and amazing rates.
testimonial.4.author: Stefani
